mapper.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCnt, A.DSCS_ID AS forumCd, A.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd, A.DSCS_TYCD AS forumCtgrCd,
CASE WHEN A.DSCS_TYCD = 'SUBS' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND STD_ID = ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) AND EXAM_ID = ( SELECT MAX(EXAM_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID ) ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'Y' END AS absent
'Y' AS absent
, CASE WHEN A.DSCS_TYCD IN ('SUBS', 'EXAM') THEN ( SELECT MAX(TKEXAM_TYCD) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B WHERE B.EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID ) ELSE 'S' END AS stareType
, A.DSCS_TTL AS forumTitle , A.DSCS_CTS AS forumArtl , A.DSCS_SDTTM AS forumStartDttm , A.DSCS_EDTTM AS forumEndDttm , A.MRK_RFLTYN AS scoreAplyYn , A.MRK_OYN AS scoreOpenYn , A.PRD_AFTR_WRTYN AS periodAfterWriteYn , A.DSCS_OYN AS forumOpenYn , A.TEAM_DSCS_STNGYN AS teamForumCfgYn , A.TEAM_TYCD AS teamCtgrCd , A.TEAM_DSCS_ATCL_OYN AS teamAtclOpenYn , A.PROS_CONS_FORUM_CFG AS prosConsForumCfg , A.OKNOKRT_OYN AS prosConsRateOpenYn , A.OKNOK_MODYN AS prosConsModYn , A.REG_OPEN_YN AS regOpenYn , A.MLT_OPNN_REGYN AS multiAtclYn , A.EVL_RSLT_OYN AS evalRsltOpenYn , A.EVL_CRTR_USEYN AS evalCritUseYn , A.MTL_EVLYN AS mutEvalYn , A.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM AS scoreOpenDttm , NVL(A.MRK_RFLTRT, 0) AS scoreRatio , A.AVG_MRK_OYN AS avgScoreOpenYn , A.DVCLAS_REGYN AS declsRegYn , A.PUSH_NOTIYN AS pushNoticeYn , A.OTEAM_DSCS_INQYN AS otherTeamViewYn , A.OTEAM_CMNT_WRT_PSBLYN AS otherTeamAplyYn , A.DELYN AS delYn , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS forumAtclCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS forumCmntCnt
, CASE WHEN A.DSCS_TYCD = 'SUBS' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT S JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT L ON S.USER_ID = L.USER_ID WHERE S.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND S.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND L.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' AND S.AUDITYN = 'N' AND S.STD_ID IN ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = NVL(( SELECT MAX(EXAM_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DELYN = 'N' ), '') ) ) ELSE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT S JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT L ON S.USER_ID = L.USER_ID WHERE S.SBJCT_ID = A.SBJCT_ID AND S.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND L.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' AND S.AUDITYN = 'N' ) END AS forumUserTotalCnt
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = #{userId}) AS forumMyAtclCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = #{userId}) AS forumMyCmntCnt
, CASE WHEN A.DSCS_TYCD = 'SUBS' THEN ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.AUDITYN = 'N' AND AA.STD_ID IN ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = ( SELECT MAX(EXAM_ID) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND DELYN = 'N' ) ) AND ( EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = AA.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = AA.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') ) ) ELSE ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT AA WHERE AA.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND AA.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AA.AUDITYN = 'N' AND ( EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = AA.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND STD_ID = AA.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N') ) ) END AS forumJoinUserCnt
, (SELECT SCR FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.STD_ID = ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) ) AS forumMyScore
, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_FDBK B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.STD_ID = ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' ) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS forumMyFdbk
FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A WHERE A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
AND ( LOWER(DSCS_TYCD) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(DSCS_TTL) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
AND A.DSCS_OYN = 'Y'
AND TO_DATE(A.DSCS_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{forumStartDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(#{forumEndDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
mapper.select:
/* 토론 개수 조회 ForumDAO.count */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
) Z WHERE Z.absent = 'Y'

/* 토론 리스트 ForumDAO.selectForum */ SELECT A.DSCS_ID AS forumCd , A.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd , A.TEAM_DSCS_STNGYN AS teamForumCfgYn , A.TEAM_TYCD AS teamCtgrCd , (SELECT TEAM_CTGRNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR WHERE TEAM_TYCD = A.TEAM_TYCD) AS teamCtgrNm , A.DSCS_SDTTM AS forumStartDttm , A.DSCS_EDTTM AS forumEndDttm , A.DSCS_OYN AS forumOpenYn , A.MRK_RFLTYN AS scoreAplyYn , A.MRK_OYN AS scoreOpenYn , A.MRK_OPEN_SDTTM AS scoreOpenDttm , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , A.PRD_AFTR_WRTYN AS periodAfterWriteYn , A.EXTD_EDTTM AS extEndDttm , A.DSCS_TYCD AS forumCtgrCd , A.DSCS_TTL AS forumTitle , A.DSCS_CTS AS forumArtl , A.TEAM_DSCS_ATCL_OYN AS teamAtclOpenYn , NVL(A.PROS_CONS_FORUM_CFG, 'N') AS prosConsForumCfg , A.OKNOKRT_OYN AS prosConsRateOpenYn , A.REG_OPEN_YN AS regOpenYn , A.MLT_OPNN_REGYN AS multiAtclYn , A.OKNOK_MODYN AS prosConsModYn , A.EVL_RSLT_OYN AS evalRsltOpenYn , A.EVL_CRTR_USEYN AS evalCritUseYn , A.EVL_CTGRCD AS evalCtgr , A.MTL_EVLYN AS mutEvalYn , A.MRK_RFLTRT AS scoreRatio , A.AVG_MRK_OYN AS avgScoreOpenYn , A.DVCLAS_REGYN AS declsRegYn , A.PUSH_NOTIYN AS pushNoticeYn , A.APLY_CMNT_RSPNSYN AS aplyAsnYn , A.DELYN AS delYn , A.EVL_RSLT_OYN AS evalRsltOpenYn , A.EVL_SDTTM AS evalStartDttm , A.EVL_EDTTM AS evalEndDttm , A.OTHER_VIEW_YN AS otherViewYn , A.OTEAM_DSCS_INQYN AS otherTeamViewYn , A.OTEAM_CMNT_WRT_PSBLYN AS otherTeamAplyYn , A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID AS lessonScheduleId , (SELECT LCTR_SCHDLNM FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT_LCTR_SCHDL WHERE LCTR_SCHDL_ID = A.LCTR_SCHDL_ID) AS lessonScheduleNm , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS forumAtclCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS forumCmntCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.OKNOK_TYCD = 'P' AND B.ATCL_LV = 0) AS forumAtclPorsCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.OKNOK_TYCD = 'C' AND B.ATCL_LV = 0) AS forumAtclConsCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S') AS forumUserTotalCnt , (SELECT SBJCTNM || ' ' || DVCLAS_NO FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}) AS crsCreNm , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT S.STD_ID, B.DSCS_ID AS DSCS_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT S JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B ON S.STD_ID = B.STD_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT C ON S.STD_ID = C.STD_ID WHERE S.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND (B.DELYN ='N'OR C.DELYN ='N') ) T WHERE T.DSCS_ID = A.DSCS_ID ) AS forumJoinUserCnt , ( SELECT T.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID FROM MTL_EVL T LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MUT_EVAL_RLTN B ON T.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = B.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID WHERE T.DELYN = 'N' AND B.LINK_CD = A.DSCS_ID ) AS evalCd , ( SELECT T.MTL_EVL_TTL FROM MTL_EVL T LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MUT_EVAL_RLTN B ON T.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = B.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID WHERE T.DELYN = 'N' AND B.LINK_CD = A.DSCS_ID ) AS evalTitle , CASE WHEN ((TO_DATE(A.DSCS_SDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400 < 0 AND ROUND((TO_DATE(A.DSCS_EDTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - SYSDATE) * 86400) > 0) OR A.PRD_AFTR_WRTYN = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN NVL((SELECT AUDITYN FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S'), 'Y') = 'Y' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'N' END AS writeAuth , NVL((SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N'), '') AS parExamCd , NVL((SELECT TKEXAM_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N'), '') AS examStareTypeCd , NVL((SELECT EXAM_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N'), '') AS parExamEndDttm FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd}

/* 팀 분류명 조회 ForumDAO.selectTeamRltn */ SELECT MAX(A.TEAM_TYCD) AS teamCtgrCd , A.DSCS_ID AS forumCd , ( SELECT B.TEAM_CTGRNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR AS B WHERE B.TEAM_TYCD = A.TEAM_TYCD ) AS teamCtgrNm FROM TB_LMS_DSCS AS A WHERE 1=1 AND A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} GROUP BY A.DSCS_ID, A.TEAM_TYCD

/* 토론 정보 가져오기 ajax ForumDAO.select */ SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.DSCS_ID , A.DSCS_TTL , A.DSCS_CTS , A.DVCLAS_REGYN , A.DSCS_SDTTM , A.DSCS_EDTTM , A.MRK_RFLTYN , A.EVL_CTGRCD , A.TEAM_DSCS_STNGYN , A.TEAM_TYCD , A.MRK_OYN , A.APLY_CMNT_RSPNSYN , A.PROS_CONS_FORUM_CFG , A.OKNOKRT_OYN , A.REG_OPEN_YN , A.MLT_OPNN_REGYN , A.OKNOK_MODYN , A.EVL_RSLT_OYN , A.EVL_CRTR_USEYN , A.EVL_CTGRCD , A.EVL_SDTTM , A.EVL_EDTTM , A.MTL_EVLYN , A.OTHER_VIEW_YN FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A WHERE DSCS_ID = #{forumCd}
mapper.update: /* 개설과정토론 연결 삭제 ForumDAO.deleteForumCreCrsRltn */ UPDATE TB_LMS_FORUM_CRE_CRS_RLTN SET DELYN='Y' WHERE DSCS_ID = #{forumCd}
/* 토론 삭제 ForumDAO.deleteForum */ UPDATE TB_LMS_DSCS SET DELYN='Y' , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE DSCS_ID= #{forumCd}
mapper.insert: /* 토론 참여자 테이블에 수강생 등록 ForumDAO.insertForumJoinUser */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP (STD_ID, DSCS_ID, TEAM_ID, SCR, RGTR_ID, FRST_INQ_DTTM) SELECT STD_ID , #{forumCd} , TEAM_ID , 0 , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() as FRST_INQ_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR WHERE TEAM_ID IN ( SELECT TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR B ON A.TEAM_TYCD = B.TEAM_TYCD WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd} )
mapper.select: /* 토론 성적 분포 현황 ForumDAO.selectScoreChart */ SELECT MIN(SCR) AS minScore , MAX(SCR) AS maxScore , ROUND(AVG(SCR)) AS avgScore FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} GROUP BY DSCS_ID
/* 토론정보 조회 ForumDAO.viewForum */ SELECT DSCS_ID , DSCS_TTL FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DSCS_ID = #{forumCd}
/* 성적반영비율 토론 리스트 ForumDAO.getScoreRatio */ SELECT DSCS_ID AS forumCd FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE 1 = 1 AND DELYN = 'N' AND MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd}
/* 팀 분류코드와 연결된 토론 목록 조회 ForumDAO.listForumByTeamCtgrCd */ SELECT DSCS_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd}
